titles.title: Thankyou Lord of the Blessings on Me – v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: While the world looks upon me As I struggle along They say I have nothing But they are so wrong In my heart, I'm rejoicing How I wish they could see Thank you Lord For your blessings on me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There's a roof up above me I've a good place to sleep There's food on my table And shoes on my feet You gave me your love Lord And a fine family Thank you Lord For your blessings on me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Although I'm not wealthy And these clothes, they're not new I don't have much money But Lord, I have you To me, that's all that matters Though the world may not see Thank you Lord For your blessings on me
